issues.description: First effect incorrectly uses OnPlay trigger. Card text says 'Select up to 1 of your {Straw Hat Crew} type Leader or Character cards' — this is an activated ability, not an on-play effect. Should be trigger:'Activated'.
Target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' lacks type filter. Card specifies '{Straw Hat Crew} type' — target should include type restriction filter.

Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but card text specifies 'during this turn' which refers to opponent's turn blocking phase. Should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' or similar active duration, not EndOfTurn (which ends immediately).
Second effect (KO trigger with cost 3) has no basis in card text. Card makes selected character Unblockable; there is no triggered KO ability. This effect should be removed entirely.
